revisions.*: Because "rvslots" was not specified, a legacy format has been used for the output. This format is deprecated, and in the future the new format will always be used.

'''7-2-365

Alternative terms: Trenail, Treenail

A cylindrical metal or wood rod or pin used for connections in stonework or timber.


Note: 1 " Trenail " and the French term cheville apply specifically to a hardwood pin.


Note: 2 The French term goujon is used only when the pin is of metal.

{{IALAFooter}}
